news_flash: WARNING: Rad-roach infestation detected near the fiber-optic trunk. Seal all conduits.
lore_stream: NCR INTELLIGENCE: A Brahmin caravan was seen carrying a G.E.C.K. case. It was empty. The caravan was sad.  ---  SIGNAL: A high-frequency chirp is coming from the UDM-Pro. It sounds like a computer trying to scream.  ---  SCAVENGER LOG: Found a pristine crate of Nuka-Cola Quantum near the UDM-Pro.  ---  SCAVENGER LOG: The King of Prussia mall is now the Kingdom of the Mirelurks.  ---  ENCLAVE: The Hellfire armor project has been resumed. The fires of the old world are being stoked.  ---  MAINTENANCE: The Elevator is Broken. Use the Stairs.  ---  SCAVENGER LOG: The SEPTA rails are completely overgrown. The trains are finally on time.  ---  WARNING: High concentrations of Mirelurks detected near the Ridley Creek banks.  ---  DWELLER LOG: I think the walls are getting closer together. Or maybe Im getting wider.  ---  SUPPLY UPDATE: Stimpaks are now 10% more Stingy.  ---  DWELLER LOG: Ive forgotten what a Tree looks like. I mean, a green one.  ---  ADVISORY: Please refrain from using Abraxo Cleaner as a substitute for toothpaste. Your enamel is not a floor.  ---  INCIDENT: A Rad-Roach the size of a terrier was found in the laundry. It was wearing a tiny sweater.  ---  WARNING: Rad-Roaches are Everywhere.  ---  SECURITY: Detected a Spy from Vault 101. He was Looking for Water.  ---  SECURITY: Found a Secret tunnel to Vault 102. It’s Empty. And Creepy.  ---  MAINTENANCE: Gravity-fed waste disposal is backed up. Please stop flushing T-51b pauldrons.  ---  MAINTENANCE: The elevator to the surface is jammed. This is for your own protection.  ---  ADVISORY: The Schuylkill River has turned a vibrant shade of violet. Please update your Geiger counter presets.  ---  ADVISORY: Buffout is for emergencies only. Not for winning the Vault arm-wrestling contest.  ---  ADVISORY: Do not pet the Rad-Stags. They have twice the heads and four times the attitude.  ---  BROTHERHOOD OF STEEL: A Paladin lost his Holotag in a game of poker. He is currently cleaning the latrines.  ---  NCR INTELLIGENCE: A Veteran Ranger was seen taking down a Deathclaw with a single knife. He looked bored.  ---  INCIDENT: The Water is Green today. St. Paddys Day was 200 years ago. Strange.  ---  WARNING: Feral Ghouls are attracted to the sound of Holotape recorders.  ---  INCIDENT: Dweller #222 has Started a Cult of The Toaster.  ---  RUMOR: There is a Vault with No Doors.  ---  SIGHTING: A Yao Guai was seen sharpening its claws on the remains of a Welcome to Pennsylvania sign.  ---  SUPPLY UPDATE: Cram is now Extra Salty.  ---  INCIDENT: The Auto-Doc has Accidentally given Dweller #404 a Lobotomy. He’s much Happier now.  ---  SECURITY: Found a Secret stash of Nuka-Cola. Sugar is Illegal.  ---  SCAVENGER LOG: The Schuylkill River is now a neon green sludge. No change there.  ---  WARNING: A Glowing One has been spotted in the sub-basement of the Drexel Hill library.  ---  THREE DOG: Dont feed the Yao Guai! Thats a PSA from your favorite DJ. They are not as cuddly as they look.  ---  LOCAL VIBE: Found a pre-war Eagles banner in the rubble. It’s the only thing that hasnt decayed.  ---  SIGNAL: An Enclave frequency is playing The Star-Spangled Banner on a loop.  ---  RAILROAD: A synth named H2-22 has successfully reached the Cloud safehouse. Morale is high.  ---  SECURITY: Detected a Signal from The Commonwealth. It’s a Radio about Settlements.  ---  SECURITY: Patrols increased in the Maintenance Tunnels. Reports of Scuttling sounds behind the fiber lines.  ---  SUPPLY UPDATE: Dandy Boy Apples are now 100% apple-free.  ---  MAINTENANCE: The Parity Check has found a soul in the machine. It has been deleted.  ---  WARNING: Mirelurk Kings have a voice like an angel. A very angry, sonic-blasting angel.  ---  INCIDENT: The Mr. Handy unit is Singing Opera while it Recycles the Trash.  ---  RUMOR: A Courier survived a bullet to the head. Some people are just too stubborn to die.  ---  PIP-BOY UPDATE: Radioactive status now includes Spontaneous Limb Growth warnings.  ---  SUPPLY UPDATE: YumYum Deviled Eggs are now YumYum Radioactive Eggs.  ---  RAILROAD: P.A.M. has calculated a 72% chance of a Brotherhood raid on the local safehouse.  ---  RAIDER WATCH: The Delco Drifters have set up a sniper nest in the steeple of an old stone church.  ---  BROTHERHOOD OF STEEL: The Prydwen is docked at the Boston Airport. Logistics ships are moving supplies to the Keystone region.  ---  COMMUNIQUE: Vault-Tec wishes you a Super-Duper day in the underground!
telemetry_stream: INTEGRITY: OPTIMAL • REACTOR: 106 F • RADS: OPTIMAL • NODE: 10.10.1.21 • UPTIME: 20:58:37
